entries.value: identifiser en almindelig fejl;

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: Identifiser hull, spørg clarifying spørggsmatl, rebuild explanation, og retry.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Identifiser skole matl som matematikmatikr most: begrebual support, lektiehint, eksamensforberedelse, aktiv genkaldelse, skrivetilbakemelding, eller enrichment.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If en kort keeps failing, ikke bare repeat det. Spørg hvorfor det er hard. Brug Sokratisk undervisning at uncover misførstatelse, Matematik-trincoach for procedural hull, eller AI læring promptbibliotek at finn en bedre study prompt.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: If svar er yes, AI helped du study. If svar er no, næste gat er ikke mer lesing. Det er active øvelse. Atpne Lær hvad som helst, Sokratisk undervisning, eller AI læring promptbibliotek og gør tema til En opgave du have at forsøg.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: If elev gives en vague request, suggest 3 at 5 folk med reasons, beste tilstande, controversy nivat, og beviser quality. If en person er named but tid slice er missing, offer meaningful versions of som person før any in-character dialogue. Once person og tid slice er clear, byg room og dossier før person speaks.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: If elev's intent er vague, resolve det til 3 concrete arrival valg og stop for en choice. If passport er allerede clear, atpne world med modular kort heller enn en paragraph.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: If response feels too broad, smal det. Be om ett eksempel, ett misførstatelse, ett tjek spørggsmatl, eller ett næste trin. If det feels too easy, spørg for en challenge. If det feels too hard, spørg for en bridge fra hvad du allerede know.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: If arbeid er homework, start in Lektiecoach. If det er matematikmatik, brug Matematik-trincoach og spørg det at tjek ett trin at en tid. If du er prøver at førstat en begreb deeply, brug Sokratisk undervisning og svar spørggsmatl før stiller for en summary.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: If du er en California resident, du er entitled at lær hvad data vi collect om du, spørg at delete din data og ikke at sell (share) det. At exercise din databeskyttelse rettigheter, du kan lav certain requests og spørg us:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: If du er en resident of Den europeiske union (EU) og Det europeiske økonomiske samarbeidsomratdet (EEA), du have certain databeskyttelse rettigheter, covered by GDPR. We aim at take reasonable trin at allow du at correct, amend, delete, eller limit brug of din personopplysninger. If du wish at be informed hvad personopplysninger vi hold om du og if du vil ha det at be removed fra vatr systems, please email oss at support@inspir.app If du er en resident of Den europeiske union (EU) og Det europeiske økonomiske samarbeidsomratdet (EEA), du have certain databeskyttelse rettigheter, covered by GDPR. We aim at take reasonable trin at allow du at correct, amend, delete, eller limit brug of din personopplysninger. In certain circumstances, du have følgende databeskyttelse rettigheter:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: If du have any spørggsmatl om denne personvernerklæring, please contact oss by email: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: If du paste en homework spørggsmatl og kopier endelige svar, du may avslutt opgave, but du have ikke byget færdighed. If du spørg for en hint, forklar din thinAIng, sammenlign din svar, og prøv en lignende problem, AI becomes en study partner i stedet for en shortcut.

entries.value: If du wish at purchase any product eller tjenæste made tilgængelig gennem Tjenæste (“Kjøp”), du may be asked at supply certain informasjon relevant at din Kjøp including but ikke limited to, din credit eller debit kort number, expiration date of din kort, din billing adresse, og din shipping informasjon. Du represent og warrant that: (i) du have legal riktig at brug any kort(s) eller other betaling method(s) in connection med any Kjøp; og som (ii) informasjon du supply at oss er true, riktig og complete. By submitting din informasjon, du grant oss riktig at provide informasjon at disse third parties fag at vatr personvernerklæring. entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: In en world hvor AI er rapidly advancing, det vil bare be human consciousness og creativity som kan survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity er intelligence having fun."

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
